faqs.question: How do competitions work?
faqs.answer: Choose a competition, purchase tickets, and wait for the draw. Winners are selected randomly using verified algorithms.

faqs.question: How will I know if I win?
faqs.answer: We'll contact you via email and display your name on our winners page. Make sure your profile contact details are up to date.

faqs.question: How are winners selected?
faqs.answer: Winners are selected using independent random number generation to ensure complete fairness.

faqs.question: How long until I receive my prize?
faqs.answer: Prizes are typically dispatched within 14 working days after the draw is verified.

faqs.question: Can I cancel my ticket purchase?
faqs.answer: Unfortunately, once a purchase is made, it cannot be cancelled. Please review your order before completing payment.

howItWorks.title: Browse Competitions
howItWorks.description: Explore our wide range of luxury prize competitions. From watches to electronics, find something that excites you.

howItWorks.title: Purchase Tickets
howItWorks.description: Select how many tickets you want to purchase. The more tickets you buy, the higher your chances of winning.

howItWorks.title: Win Big
howItWorks.description: Wait for the draw date. If you're lucky, you'll be announced as a winner and receive your amazing prize!

features.title: Fair & Transparent
features.description: All draws are independently verified and completely random.

features.title: Premium Prizes
features.description: We source only the finest luxury prizes from trusted brands.

features.title: Community First
features.description: Join thousands of members who trust us with their prize dreams.

features.title: Instant Updates
features.description: Real-time notifications when you win or competitions update.
